name: lifestyle-dashboard
description: Fitbit-style lifestyle monitor web experience with shared auth for web and app clients.

scripts.check:nut-model: bash -lc 'PY="${NUT_MODEL_PYTHON_BIN:-}"; if [ -z "$PY" ]; then if [ -x NUT_model/.venv/bin/python ]; then PY="NUT_model/.venv/bin/python"; else PY="python"; fi; fi; "$PY" NUT_model/nut_estimator.py --self-check --model NUT_model/checkpoint/canet_NUT.pth'
